app.title: Running Gemma 4 locally with LM Studio's new headless CLI and Claude Code
app.description: A guide to running Gemma 4 locally
proposed_tests: Test the setup and deployment of Gemma 4 locally

Check the documentation and usage examples for the headless CLI
